summary: A clip from a local news segment labeled THE DEEP DIVE. It opens with an exterior shot of a brick building bearing the words FAIRFAX COUNTY COURTHOUSE, then cuts to a seated interview with a man in a dark suit in a room with framed art. The lower-third reads DHS SECRETARY CONCERNED WITH ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS WHO COMMIT CRIMES.

script.scene: Exterior of a brick building reading FAIRFAX COUNTY COURTHOUSE; lower-third reads DHS SECRETARY CONCERNED WITH ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS WHO COMMIT CRIMES.
A man in a dark suit speaks during a seated interview in a room with framed art.
The interview continues; THE DEEP DIVE label remains.
